method: Held-out synthetic day-offset windows constructed directly against the pure functions in app/schedule_factors.py (Pongal-window day-overlap arithmetic, availability-factor slip formula) — not the bundled schedule.csv. Verifies the deterministic arithmetic behind the P1b 'workforce availability' schedule-risk input. This rule is honestly dormant on the bundled demo dataset (documented in PROGRESS.md and the Schedule page's methodology panel, GET /api/schedule/methodology) — this eval proves the formula is correct, independent of whether the live demo happens to exercise it.
